title: Atho Vanile Nila Lyrics Isai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Atho Vanile Nila Lyrics From Isai
Singer: Karthik, Chinmayi and Deva | Lyrics: Karky

Nila mayangudhe ho
nila mayangudhe
pinbu nila thayangudhey

kolaththula neerula
kalla erinji.
valachi valchi nenja pilingi
thittam pottu theenda
thudichchaa thayangudhey.

nila thayangudhey
nila thayangudhey ho
nila mayangudhey
unna parkka thayangudhey

Nenju thunda thaaney
naanum kalla veesinen.
neeril vattam pottu
unaku valayal maattinen.

Pechu mattumthaan
perusaa irukku.
seyalil settai
kanda nilavu mirandu
irukku.

Indha valarura thaeyira
valakkam yenadi.
sollu nilave
velli nilave
nillu nilave
padhil sollu nilave

Nilave nilave
velli nilave.
Kulir thulli thulli
varum nilave
nenjai killi killi
vidum nilave.
adhai alli alli
oli veesi veesi dhinam
pesum nilave.

en annai arul pettra nilave
ini anbu thamil pesu nilave
engal nilave
vaanilave.

NIla thaakkudhey ho
NIla thaakkudhey
enai paakkudhey ho
nila thaakkudhey

nila odivaa ohh
nila odivaa
muththam kodukkave ohh
nila odivaa

Muththam enna muththam
ennai moththam tharugirean.
Saththam indri niththam
megam meththai virikkiren.

Nee pournami
aagidum podhu.
angu pani vilum
malargalin meedhu.

en uyira un
kaluthtula kayiraa
maalai sottuven
nilave maalai soottuven.
maalai soottuven
unnai manadhil koottuven.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Atho Vanile Nila'?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, inviting the beloved to join in a journey of emotions.

In which movie is 'Atho Vanile Nila' featured?

'Atho Vanile Nila' is featured in the movie Isai.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and Karthik.

Who composed the music for 'Atho Vanile Nila'?

The music for this song was composed by SJ Surya.

When was 'Atho Vanile Nila' released?

The song was released on November 20, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Isai, 'Atho Vanile Nila' serves as a poignant expression of love, where the protagonists yearn for each other amidst life's complexities. The soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The collaboration between Chinmayi and Karthik brings a unique chemistry that enhances the emotional depth of the song. Overall, it beautifully encapsulates the essence of longing and connection in relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Atho Vanile Nila from Isai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Karthik, this song takes listeners on a soothing journey through love and longing. The masterful composition by SJ Surya adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The moon in the sky is searching for something.
Let it come to me as a companion, listen to it.
The moon in the sky is searching for something.
The moon in the sky is looking for its pair.
A companion that is meant for it, let it rise above the mountain.
Who is the companion that is meant for it?
After finding a companion, if it searches, it will be a true gathering.
Is the companion suitable? If it is suitable, it is good.
The moon in the sky is searching for something.
The moon in the sky is looking for its pair.
The moon is fading, oh the moon is fading, then the moon is shining.
In the form of water, the thief is hidden. It has made a plan to deceive the heart and is now shining.
The moon is shining, the moon is shining, oh the moon is fading, it is shining to see you.
My heart is the thief, I have also stolen. I have made a circle in the water and changed it for you.
Only words are abundant. In actions, the moon that is seen is rare.
I have seen your beautiful eyes. I have seen that beautiful heart.
Why is this growth of the moon so bright? Tell me, moon, silver moon, stop, moon, tell me the answer, moon.
The moon in the sky is searching for something.
Oh moon, oh moon, silver moon. The cool dew drops come, the moon will pierce the heart. It will speak daily, oh moon, oh moon, let it shine.
The moon that my mother blessed me with, now love speaks Tamil, our moon, oh moon in the sky.
The moon is shining, oh the moon is shining, look at me, oh the moon is shining.
The black gaze of the heart is troubling, troubling, in this it is new.
Give a kiss and take it all.
Oh moon, oh moon, give a kiss and take it all.
I am giving you everything. Without a sound, the cloud is spreading.
In the flower garden, the bees and the flowers will bloom.
When you become a full moon, there the dew will fall on the flowers.
I will give my life in your embrace, I will wrap you in the moonlight. I will wrap you in the moonlight and keep you in my heart.
The moon in the sky is searching for something.
